title: Aztralli
shortDesc: Aztralli is an African online marketplace connecting buyers, wholesalers, and sellers with secure escrow payments and delivery services.
longDesc: Aztralli is a digital e-commerce platform built to help African businesses and consumers trade efficiently online. The platform connects verified wholesalers and retailers in a secure ecosystem, enabling seamless buying, selling, and delivery while integrating escrow-based payment protection and real-time logistics support.

title: X Mineral
shortDesc: A modern landing page for a mineral exploration and mining company showcasing services, resources, and industry expertise.
longDesc: X Mineral is a corporate website designed to present a mineral exploration and mining company. The platform highlights the company's expertise in mineral resource exploration, mining operations, and sustainable extraction practices. It includes sections for company overview, services, projects, and contact information, providing potential investors and partners with insights into the organization’s capabilities and operations in the mining industry.

title: EasyStatements
shortDesc: EasyStatements is a web tool that allows users to quickly generate and download professional financial statements.
longDesc: EasyStatements is a web-based platform that enables users to create professional financial or account statements quickly and easily. The platform allows users to input relevant information and instantly generate downloadable statements for documentation, verification, or reporting purposes. It simplifies the process of preparing structured financial records without the need for complex spreadsheets or accounting software.

title: Laycons
shortDesc: Laycons is a personal creative portfolio showcasing web design and development work.
longDesc: Laycons serves as a digital portfolio platform highlighting personal projects, UI/UX design work, and development case studies to attract collaborators and clients.

title: Code Learners Hub
shortDesc: An online learning platform offering curated courses in web development and programming.
longDesc: Code Learners Hub provides a platform to learn, collaborate, and validate skills through curated courses. It has over 15k students taught and more than 12 years of combined tutor experience, offering guidance in Full Stack C#, Python, and JavaScript web development.

title: Kamdun
shortDesc: Kamdun presents tech solutions and digital services for modern businesses.
longDesc: Kamdun is a tech-focused portfolio site showcasing digital solutions and services aimed at helping businesses grow their online presence and leverage technology for performance and market reach.

title: My Portfolio
shortDesc: Showcases my work and lets others learn more about me, including projects, case studies, and professional information.
longDesc: My portfolio website highlights my projects, development experience, and technical skills. It serves as a central platform for potential clients, collaborators, or employers to explore my work and understand the value I bring as a developer. The site is designed to showcase my capabilities while also helping me attract freelance work, agency clients, or employment opportunities.

title: Atlaxa
shortDesc: Atlaxa is an e-commerce marketplace promoting authentic African goods and entrepreneurial growth.
longDesc: Atlaxa is a dynamic online marketplace that connects African artisans, manufacturers, and entrepreneurs with global buyers. The platform showcases locally made products across categories such as fashion, crafts, home decor, and art, empowering local businesses to reach wider markets and promote African creativity globally.

title: Oddience
shortDesc: Oddience makes it easy for professionals to launch and scale their private practice.
longDesc: Oddience empowers professionals with instant business and booking pages that include global payments and conferencing features to help them grow their practice efficiently.

title: Jalsa Registration Portal
shortDesc: Ahmadiyya Muslim Jama'at Nigeria (AMJN) Jalsa Salana Registration Portal.
longDesc: A web platform where members of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Jama'at Nigeria (AMJN) and their guests can register to attend the annual Jalsa Salana event. The system streamlines attendee registration, data management, and event coordination for the organization.
role: Backend Developer, Frontend Developer, Team Lead

title: Funaab School Portal
shortDesc: An online gateway where students can log in to access academic and institutional information.
longDesc: The portal allows students to access important academic information such as available courses, transcripts, timetables, exam schedules, department contact information, and institutional email programs through a centralized system.

title: Movie App
shortDesc: A web application that allows users to explore movies, series, and TV show details.
longDesc: The Movie App allows users to search and explore information about movies, television series, and shows. It displays key details such as ratings, descriptions, release dates, and related media without requiring a paid streaming subscription.

title: Caleb School Portal
shortDesc: An academic portal for students to access school-related information and services.
longDesc: The Caleb School Portal enables students to log in and manage their academic activities, access course information, view timetables, review exam schedules, and retrieve institutional communications and resources.

title: Calculator App
shortDesc: A simple calculator web app for performing basic arithmetic operations.
longDesc: A beautifully designed calculator web application that enables users to perform basic arithmetic operations such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division through an intuitive and responsive interface.
